title: Add `memAvailable` field to `/libpod/info` host response
body: ### Feature request description The `GET /libpod/info` endpoint currently returns `host.memTotal` and `host.memFree` but does not expose `host.memAvailable`. Consumers of this API compute e.g. "used memory" as `memTotal - memFree`. On Linux, `MemFree` from `/proc/meminfo` represents only truly unused pages — it does **not** include reclaimable memory (buff/cache). This causes memory usage to appear significantly higher than it actually is. The memAvailable accounts for reclaimable page cache and reclaimable slab. ### Example The buff/cache is immediately reclaimable by applications but counted as "used" with the current fields ### Suggest potential solution _No response_ ### Have you considered any alternatives? A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. ### Additional context https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop/issues/17488
